english: yes (contradicting a negative) / but / after all / surely / come on
notes: A highly versatile modal particle. As a response particle, it contradicts a negative statement or question (e.g. 'Kommst du nicht?' – 'Doch!'). As a modal particle it adds emphasis, reassurance, or mild contradiction. Also used as a conjunction meaning 'but/however'.

sentences.german: Kommst du nicht mit? – Doch, natürlich komme ich mit!
sentences.english: Aren't you coming along? – Yes, of course I am!

sentences.german: Das ist doch nicht dein Ernst!
sentences.english: You can't be serious! / Surely you're not serious!

sentences.german: Er wollte nicht kommen, doch am Ende erschien er doch.
sentences.english: He didn't want to come, but in the end he showed up after all.
